title: Duda expands its AI stack to bridge the gap between fast website generation and enterprise-grade security
excerpt: AI tools built specifically with agencies in mind
content_html:
• Duda launches new AI tools to help agencies build complex sites
  • New tools include vibe coding, a custom widget generator, and brief-driven website creation
  • The new releases build on Duda's existing stack of AI tools for agencies

Duda, a dedicated website-building platform for agencies, has rolled out new AI tools that aim to combine the speed and ease of AI website building with the enterprise-grade security, predictability, and customization requirements of professional agencies.

In a press release shared with TechRadar Pro, Duda shared details on the new tools and features that include vibe coding, a custom widget editor, and brief-driven site building, adding to Duda’s existing suite of AI tools.

Connecting agencies to AI capabilities

This most recent update includes both new tools and updates to already established features.

  • Duda Vibe (new feature): A conversational web application editor that allows agencies to ‘vibe-code’ web tools and dynamic web applications with plain-English prompts.
  • In-editor custom widget generator (new feature): This feature was previously a separate developer tool; the update brings it into the core website editor. Users can now prompt AI to generate drag-and-drop elements.
  • Brief-driven site building (expanded features): Duda has expanded the capabilities of this tool, allowing users to upload media files, client briefs, and call transcripts. AI then digests the provided information and uses it to create a multi-page website.

Duda’s update further cements its position as a leading website builder for agencies. Although platforms like Wix and Squarespace also offer AI website building capabilities, these typically target DIY website builders, failing to address the processes and levels of complexity required by website agencies.

“Small businesses still need a strong digital presence, but the digital landscape is becoming more complex, not less,” said Itai Sadan, CEO and co-founder of Duda. “AI makes it easier to create a starting point, but businesses will continue to rely on agencies to deliver secure, high-performing websites that are easily found by LLMs and drive results. Our role is to give the professionals building tens, hundreds, or thousands of sites the AI-powered platform they need to do it faster, more predictably, at higher quality, and profitably—all at scale.”

Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

Owain has been building websites and online stores for his own and his client's businesses for over 8 years. Having taken on a role at TechRadar Pro in 2023, he now leads on all website builder and CRM content, spending his days researching, testing, and reviewing some of the best website building and CRM platforms on the market. He also has a passion for helping people get a great deal on website builders, delivering the best coupon and promo codes on the market. With an extensive background in business, Owain holds a BA(Hons) in Business and Marketing and has written for several leading publications including MarketingProfs, Website Builder Expert, Digital Doughnut, and NealSchaffer.com.

content_html_zh:
• Duda 推出新的人工智能工具来帮助机构构建复杂的网站
  • 新工具包括氛围编码、自定义小部件生成器和简短驱动的网站创建
  • 新版本建立在 Duda 现有的机构人工智能工具堆栈之上

Duda 是一个专门为机构提供的网站建设平台，推出了新的人工智能工具，旨在将人工智能网站建设的速度和易用性与专业机构的企业级安全性、可预测性和定制要求结合起来。

在与 TechRadar Pro 分享的新闻稿中，Duda 分享了有关新工具和功能的详细信息，其中包括振动编码、自定义小部件编辑器和简短驱动的网站构建，这些都添加到了 Duda 现有的 AI 工具套件中。

将机构与人工智能功能连接起来

此最新更新包括新工具和对已建立功能的更新。

  • Duda Vibe（新功能）：一种对话式 Web 应用程序编辑器，允许机构使用简单的英语提示对 Web 工具和动态 Web 应用程序进行“vibe 编码”。
  • 编辑器内自定义小部件生成器（新功能）：此功能以前是一个单独的开发人员工具；更新将其带入核心网站编辑器。 用户现在可以提示 AI 生成拖放元素。
  • 简报驱动的网站建设（扩展功能）：Duda 扩展了该工具的功能，允许用户上传媒体文件、客户简报和通话记录。 然后，人工智能会消化所提供的信息并使用它来创建一个多页面网站。

Duda 的更新进一步巩固了其作为领先的机构网站建设者的地位。 尽管 Wix 和 Squarespace 等平台也提供人工智能网站构建功能，但这些平台通常针对 DIY 网站构建者，无法满足网站机构所需的流程和复杂程度。

Duda 首席执行官兼联合创始人 Itai Sadan 表示：“小型企业仍然需要强大的数字化影响力，但数字化环境正变得越来越复杂，而不是越来越复杂。” “人工智能使创建起点变得更加容易，但企业将继续依赖代理机构来提供安全、高性能的网站，这些网站很容易被法学硕士找到并推动结果。 我们的职责是为构建数十、数百或数千个站点的专业人士提供他们所需的人工智能平台，使其更快、更可预测、更高质量并实现盈利——而且都是大规模的。”

订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

Owain 为自己和客户的企业构建网站和在线商店已有 8 年多的时间。 他于 2023 年在 TechRadar Pro 任职，现在领导所有网站构建器和 CRM 内容，每天研究、测试和审查市场上一些最好的网站构建和 CRM 平台。 他还热衷于帮助人们在网站建设者上获得优惠，提供市场上最好的优惠券和促销代码。 Owain 拥有丰富的商业背景，拥有商业和市场营销（荣誉）学士学位，并为数家领先出版物撰写文章，包括 MarketingProfs、Website Builder Expert、Digital Doughnut 和 NealSchaffer.com。
